notes: v338 — UNDO AUTO-SELLS, AND A TIDIER SHARE ROW. (1) ↩ Undo auto-sells. If your rules (the 🪤 trailing stop, 🛑 stop-loss, 🎯 target or ⏱ time exit) automatically closed positions and you want them back, you now can. Open 💼 Portfolio and, when there are auto-sold positions, a green banner at the top tells you how many and gives a “↩ Restore all” button — or open 📜 Trade history and tap the green ↩ Undo beside any single sale to bring just that one back. Restoring returns the shares to your holdings and reverses the cash from the sale, and it clears that position's stop so it won't instantly sell again. Your trading rules are left exactly as they are (so a restored position could be auto-sold again if it still meets a rule — turn the rule off first in 📋 My trading rules if you don't want that). It works on whichever account you're viewing (👤 your trading or the 🤖 bot's test account). (2) The share row is tidier. Each share had eight action links (News, Announcements, Deep dive, Chart, History, Technicals, Report, Buy), which was crowding the screen on some browsers. News and Technicals have moved off the row into the 🔬 Deep dive (News is the “📰 Latest news” button there; Technicals is a new button next to the chart), leaving six on the row: Deep dive, Chart, History, Announcements, Report, Buy. The narrower row also helps the table draw a little faster. Hard-refresh to load v338. ALSO RECENT — v337 — fixed the app freezing / running extremely slow on a big market (the whole-market history top-up now runs in background slices, and the table shows the top 300 by default). ALSO RECENT — v336 — the 📋 Signal report card gained a 🖨 Save / print button and a new lesson on reading it & the 🪜 ladder. ALSO RECENT — v335 — scans no longer freeze or fail to open on phones. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
